mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID as useStplatId, USE_STPLAT_NM as useStplatNm, USE_STPLAT_CN as useStplatCn, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN as infoProvdAgreCn, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm, FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm, LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNSTPLATINFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{useStplatId}

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID as useStplatId, USE_STPLAT_NM as useStplatNm, USE_STPLAT_CN as useStplatCn, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN as infoProvdAgreCn, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm, FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm, LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNSTPLATINFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY USE_STPLAT_NM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNSTPLATINFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LETTNSTPLATINFO ( USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{useStplatId}, #{useStplatNm}, #{useStplatCn}, #{infoProvdAgreCn}, sysdate(), #{frstRegisterId}, sysdate(), #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LETTNSTPLATINFO SET USE_STPLAT_NM=#{useStplatNm}, USE_STPLAT_CN=#{useStplatCn}, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN=#{infoProvdAgreCn}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM=sysdate(), LAST_UPDUSR_ID=#{lastUpdusrId} WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{useStplatId}
